title: Fix package.json prepare and main/module
description: Fix: (1) prepare script is `echo 'Skipping prepare' || true` — re-enable with `husky` (or remove husky if not wanted); (2) main field should be dist/index.cjs (not dist/index.js); (3) remove module field (was src/smithery-minimal.ts which is dead).
validation: Read package.json, confirm prepare works (or husky is removed), main is dist/index.cjs, module field removed.
